headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -73.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 16% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate today with 145 quotes and an overwhelming 113 at strong intensity, pushing the score to 45.5 — people are venting with real force.
• Optimism has dropped sharply from -9.0 to -57.5, sitting near its 166-day floor of -65.5, signalling one of the most pessimistic days on record.
• Fears remain subdued at -29.9, holding in the lower half of their historical range despite a slight worsening from yesterday.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
